retrieved_result: Pay for Delete Agreement: Delete Collection Accounts from Credit Reports Debt collectors can delete collection accounts from your credit reports. Never let them tell you it can’t be done. If they put a collection account on your credit reports, they can take it off. One strategy to delete collection accounts is through a pay for delete agreement. A
